items.title: Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening, Iran says
items.summary: The deal which will pave the way for hostilities to end is close to being finalised, the US, Iran and mediators Pakistan say.

items.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
items.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

items.title: French town buries murdered child as questions mount over police failings
items.summary: The prime suspect in the killing of Lyhanna, 11, was reported to police nine months prior but never questioned.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: Some on-air claims about Dominion Voting Systems were false, Fox News acknowledges in statement after deal is announced

items.summary: • Fox-Dominion trial delay 'is not unusual,' judge says • Fox News' defamation battle isn't stopping Trump's election lies

items.title: 歷時144年全球最高教堂完工 林志玲曬同框聖家堂美照致敬高第
items.summary: 位於西班牙巴塞隆納的聖家堂歷經144年漫長建造，作為主塔的「耶穌基督塔」（Jesus Christ Tower）日前正式完工，知名女星林志玲接受媒體邀請擔任文化大使，前往當地親身...…

items.title: 日本三重縣女高中生失蹤29年 警到車站發傳單籲各界提供線索
items.summary: 日本三重縣松阪工業高中3年級17歲女學生北山結子，1997年6月13日失蹤後長達29年下落不明，松阪警察署今（13日）派遣17名警力前往JR松阪車站發放傳單，呼籲各界踴躍提供線索...…

items.title: 美伊停火傳讓步放行海峽「收費」 以色列拒買單擬逕自開戰
items.summary: 美伊兩國即將簽署為期60天的停火協定。根據《華盛頓郵報》報導，這項協定已進入最終階段，但美方在關鍵海峽控制權上的重大讓步，已引發盟友以色列強烈反彈。  川普政府一名匿名高級...…
